$comment: Procedural memory: how the loop behaves. Read at runtime; never hard-code these in code.

gate.$comment: Hard thresholds from BUILD_BRIEF section 3. Persist only if ALL pass.

loop.$comment: Bounded iteration. max_iterations is the hard cap; target_pass_rate is the calibration goal.

hfe.$comment: Which ideal preset and how many internal HFE iterations per run.

verification.$comment: Verify-before-trust: fused/jumped hypotheses are not durable until checked.
